Table of Contents

Interface IConversionNotation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to functions that convert to and from various geographic string notations.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("5F90BCEF-A161-443A-A8C7-450C3FAEF4AB")]
public interface IConversionNotation : IConversionMGRS
